function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0010
alias: helios_checklist_pack_invoice
issued_on: 2026-04-14
total_eur: 780
counterparty: Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH
project: Helios Workflow Sprint
related_entity: Claudia Reiter
lines:
  - item: checklist rewrite and rollout pack
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 780
    line_eur: 780
---
# Helios checklist rewrite invoice

```text
+----------------+--------------------------------+
| field          | value                          |

| project        | Helios Workflow Sprint         |
| related_entity | Claudia Reiter                 |
+----------------+--------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                               | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | checklist rewrite and rollout pack | 1   | 780      | 780      |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                              |     |          | 780      |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

Recent client-visible invoice tied to the sprint deliverable rather than open-ended product thinking.
